description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, finished in a deep blue color. The front features a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen with a small notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is a solid blue panel with a glossy finish, displaying a centered Apple logo and a dual-camera module in the top left corner, each lens encircled by a metallic ring. The sides are flat and metallic, with visible buttons for volume control and a power/lock switch, as well as a small orange accent for the mute switch. The device is thin and compact, typical of contemporary mobile phones, and appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal. Its overall design is minimalist and premium, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A sleek, blue modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and metallic side buttons. The design is minimalist and premium, featuring a glossy back with an Apple logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass touchscreen with a notch at the top and visible side buttons.
description_view_1: Angled front-side view highlighting the slim profile, metallic edge, and button placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the glossy blue back, centered Apple logo, and dual camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view emphasizing the camera bump, side buttons, and orange mute switch.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back panel, clearly visible and contrasting with the blue surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a lock screen with the time '14:05', date 'Tuesday, August 24', a lock icon, and two circular icons at the bottom, all over a pastel abstract wallpaper.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses arranged diagonally in a raised square module at the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small flash.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons are visible: two volume buttons and a mute switch on the left edge, and a power/lock button on the right edge. The mute switch has an orange accent.
